insights: BMI: 22.1 (Normal). Healthy weight range. Maintain with balanced diet and activity.
Your Basal Metabolic Rate is 1636 kcal/day — calories your body burns at complete rest.
Your TDEE is 2536 kcal/day — total daily burn at your activity level (Moderately Active (moderate exercise 3-5 days/week)).
Your personalised calorie target is 2836 kcal/day to muscle gain (lean bulk).

tips: Eat protein within 30-60 minutes after strength training.
Spread protein intake evenly across all meals for optimal synthesis.
Don't skip meals — muscle gain requires consistent calorie surplus.
Prioritise sleep — 80% of growth hormone is released during deep sleep.
Aim for 38g fibre/day — include vegetables, dals, and whole grains.
Target 2.5 litres of water daily, more if exercising.
Include a source of colour at every meal — red/orange/green vegetables.
Limit ultra-processed foods — they are high in sodium, sugar, and unhealthy fats.
Plan meals in advance to avoid last-minute poor food choices.
